name: xdm_runtime_polish_overlay
description: Adds runtime polish, responsive Downloads states, headless layout coverage, and a corrected shell architecture guard for descendant state visibility.
commitMessage: Polish runtime states and responsive Downloads UI
constraints: Apply on top of commit d9778e3
Preserve all download commands, storage pickers, keyboard shortcuts and accessibility metadata
Preserve virtualized download and timeline lists
Keep the details pane available and resizable at every supported window width
Require zero warnings and zero errors
Do not change download-engine behavior or persistence formats
Allow descendant IsVisible bindings for runtime state surfaces while keeping page-root visibility owned by the shell
